text.title: Vector DB Dev Setup — Decision Tree
text.summary: Routes by chosen DB to install path.

conclusion.verdict: docker run qdrant/qdrant:v1.10.0 + pip install qdrant-client==1.10.0
docker compose weaviate:v1.25.0 + pip install weaviate-client==4.6.0
docker compose milvus standalone v2.4 + pip install pymilvus==2.4.0
docker postgres + CREATE EXTENSION vector + pip install pgvector
pip install chromadb==0.5.0 (no docker needed for dev)
